title: atriplex patula var. littoralis
intro: Atriplex patula var. littoralis, also known as seaside saltbush, is a variety of shrub found in coastal areas, characterized by its ability to thrive in salty and dry environments. The medicinal properties of Atriplex patula var. littoralis include its potential in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of dietary fiber and water content. The health benefits associated with this plant include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Atriplex patula var. littoralis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
